entries.label: customer_create_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → @radix-ui/react-dialog Dialog with DialogContent/DialogFooter
Local React.useState form → useForm + zodResolver (zod schema: name required, email required + .email(), category enum, terms coerce.number())
Inline const valid guard → zod refinement + form.formState.isValid disables submit button
Mock SH_CUSTOMERS dropdown static list → Drizzle select query in Server Component or SWR fetch, passed as prop
Credit limit field marked Phase 2 → hide behind feature flag or render disabled with tooltip
Add Server Action with RBAC guard (shipping_manager role) + audit INSERT to shipping_audit_log
Hardcoded labels (Customer code, Category) → next-intl t() keys under shipping.customers.*

entries.label: address_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent, footer buttons in DialogFooter
Uncontrolled defaultValue inputs → useForm register() controlled fields with zod: line1/city/postal/country required, postal regex pattern
Hardcoded country options (PL/GB/DE/CZ/SK) → reference data table query or static enum
Inline alert-blue V-SHIP-SO-02 rule → server-side validation: block SO confirm if no shipping address, not enforced client-only
Add Server Action with customer_id param, upsert addresses table, emit customer.address_updated event
Dock hours stored as JSON string → parse/validate JSON on save, consider separate structured field
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.addresses.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-08: V-SHIP-SO-02 enforced on SO confirm but not on Customer Detail address list

entries.label: allergen_restriction_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Static SH_ALLERGENS array → allergen_families reference table query (02-SETTINGS §8)
Uncontrolled select → useForm controlled Select with zod enum validation for allergen and restriction_type
Alert note about allergen_cascade_v1 → inline info callout linking to Settings rule registry (SET-050)
Add Server Action: INSERT customer_allergen_restrictions, emit customer.allergen_updated outbox event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allergens.*

entries.label: so_create_wizard_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=fullpage → Dialog with full-viewport DialogContent or custom Sheet from @radix-ui/react-dialog
Local useState step machine (header/lines/allergen/review) → useReducer or react-hook-form multi-step with step index stored in component state
Shared Stepper component → shadcn Steps pattern or custom ol with aria-current step indicators
Allergen cascade check (hasAllergenConflict) → server-side allergen_cascade_v1 rule call via Server Action on step advance, not client-only
Inline editable lines table (product/qty/unitPrice) → react-table with inline cell editing or FieldArray from react-hook-form
SH_CUSTOMERS mock data → Drizzle customers query filtered by active=true, passed via loader
Hardcoded shipping addresses in step 1 → customer_addresses relation query filtered by type=shipping
Summary step reads from accumulated form state → display from useFormContext values
Add Server Action: create_draft_so() transactional — inserts sales_orders + sales_order_lines, triggers auto-allocate flag check
Acknowledged allergen checkbox blocks next step → server guard on confirm: allergen_overrides table check
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.wizard.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-02: allergen conflict SO wizard — override-inline path collapse when shipping_qa active not implemented

entries.label: so_line_add_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent/DialogFooter
Static product select with embedded GTIN+allergen+price → Combobox (Command + Popover) querying finished_articles joined with allergens
Uncontrolled inputs → useForm with zod: qty must be positive integer, unitPrice positive decimal
Auto-fill unit price from products.default_sell_price → onChange product handler fetches price via SWR or Server Action
Add Server Action: insert_so_line() with SO status guard (must be draft), audit-log price changes
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.lines.*

entries.label: allocation_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded .fefo-compare two-card comparison → extract FefoCompare component taking suggested/selected LP props from query
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.fefo_deviation static list → reason_codes reference table query filtered by context=fefo_deviation
Conditional ReasonInput for other reason → show/hide via watch('reason') === 'other' in useForm
Add Server Action: create_alloc_override() — INSERT pick_overrides, emit shipping.fefo.overridden outbox event (D-SHP-13)
Alert mentioning pick_overrides + event → production event uses UUID v7 idempotency key per R14
RBAC: shipping_manager role required; gate Server Action with session.role check
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allocation.override.*

entries.label: hold_place_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.hold_place static → reason_codes table query filtered by context=hold_place
ReasonInput minLength=10 → zod string().min(10, 'Must be at least 10 characters')
Hold type drives reason code context → onChange holdType triggers refetch of reason codes filtered by type
Add Server Action: place_hold() — INSERT so_holds, update sales_orders.status=held, emit so.held outbox event
Role gate in alert: credit_control for credit type, shipping_qa for qa/allergen, shipping_manager for manual → enforce in Server Action RBAC check
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.holds.place.*

entries.label: hold_release_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent; btn-success → primary variant with green token override
Hardcoded hold summary rows → Summary component fed from so_holds query for selected hold_id
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.hold_release static → reason_codes table query filtered by context=hold_release
Add Server Action: release_hold() — UPDATE so_holds.status=released, progress SO to confirmed, INSERT shipping_audit_log
Status transition (held → confirmed) is guarded by hold type matching user role (credit_control/shipping_qa)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.holds.release.*

entries.label: partial_fulfillment_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded short lines table → feed from so_allocation_rows where qty_allocated < qty_ordered for given SO
Radio group decision (ship_partial/wait/backorder) → RadioGroup + RadioGroupItem from @radix-ui/react-radio-group
Conditional reason code select (ship_partial or backorder) → useWatch('decision') drives conditional field rendering
Backorder info alert (SO-2026-2454) → compute backorder SO# server-side; show only after decision=backorder selected
Add Server Action: resolve_partial() — three branches: mark partial, place wait hold, or create backorder draft SO
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.partial.*

entries.label: short_pick_resolve_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded pick summary rows → Summary fed from pick_lines query for given pick_line_id
Radio group (ship_short/substitute/wait) → RadioGroup from @radix-ui/react-radio-group
Conditional sub-LP table for substitute option → query lps by product_id FEFO sorted, show only when decision=substitute
FefoRank primitive → map rank integer to colored badge (1=green/best, higher=amber/red)
Add Server Action: resolve_short_pick() — three branches: mark line short, swap LP, or set pending; emit pick_override event
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.short_pick → reason_codes reference table
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.short.*

entries.label: so_cancel_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent; btn-danger → destructive variant
Hardcoded '6 LP(s) will be released' → query active allocations for SO and count before rendering modal
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.cancel → reason_codes table filtered by context=cancel
Triple gate (reason + notes min10 + confirmed checkbox) → zod schema with all three fields required
Add Server Action: cancel_so() — UPDATE sales_orders.status=cancelled, release all LP hard-locks in license_plates, INSERT shipping_audit_log, emit so.cancelled event
V-SHIP-SO-07 guard (block if shipped/delivered) → server-side status check before action executes
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.cancel.*

entries.label: wave_release_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded Summary rows (wave stats) → feed from waves table query for given wave_id
Static picker assign select → users query filtered by role=picker AND on_shift=true
Notify checkbox → maps to notification_preferences or push notification trigger on release
Add Server Action: release_wave() — UPDATE waves.status=released, assign picker_id if selected, push scanner notification via /scanner/shipping/pick SSE channel
Alert about /scanner/shipping/pick route → production uses real-time SSE or WebSocket for scanner queue push
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.wave.release.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-03: wave edit modal — unreleased column Edit stub button without modal backing

entries.label: pick_reassign_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded current picker value → feed from pick_lists.assigned_to join users for given pick_list_id
Static new picker select → users query filtered by role=picker AND on_shift=true, excluding current picker
Add Server Action: reassign_picker() — UPDATE pick_lists.assigned_to, INSERT shipping_audit_log, emit pick.reassigned event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.reassign.*

entries.label: pack_close_carton_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Hardcoded Summary rows (box details) → feed from pack_boxes + pack_box_items query for active_box_id
Catch-weight variance calculation (cwVar) → compute server-side comparing actual_kg vs products.nominal_kg, store in pack_boxes.weight_variance_pct
Confirm weight input → zod positive number, server-side validate within products.variance_tolerance_pct (V-SHIP-PACK-02)
Add Server Action: close_box() — INSERT sscc_labels with atomic sequence (SELECT nextval), UPDATE pack_boxes.status=closed, emit ZPL job to printer queue (ZPL-SH-01)
SSCC generation: atomic PostgreSQL sequence + GS1 company prefix + mod-10 check digit, not client-side
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pack.close.*

entries.label: ship_confirm_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog with wide DialogContent (max-w-3xl or custom class)
Two-column layout (summary left, checklist right) → CSS grid 1fr 1fr inside DialogContent
Pre-condition checklist array (checks) → compute server-side from shipment state: boxes_sscc count, bol_generated flag, qa_holds count, pick_lines_resolved; pass as serialized array to component
D365 outbox payload preview (collapsible pre) → Server Component renders live payload from shipments table, collapse via Collapsible from @radix-ui/react-collapsible

Add Server Action: confirm_shipment() transactional — UPDATE shipments.status=shipped + shipped_at=NOW(), UPDATE license_plates.status=shipped, INSERT shipping_outbox_events with UUID v7 idempotency key, enqueue D365 dispatcher job (retry 5m/30m/2h/12h/24h), gate via feature flag d365_shipping_push_enabled
allPass guard on submit → server-side re-check all preconditions atomically before committing, not client-only
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.ship.confirm.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-14: shipment confirm — partial auto-retry UI has retry cadence but no DLQ kick button

entries.label: sscc_preview_reprint_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=wide → Dialog with wide DialogContent
Two-column layout (label preview left, details right) → CSS grid 1fr 1fr
SsccLabelPreview embedded component → extract as separate server-renderable component that outputs GS1-128 label HTML for print CSS
SH_OVERRIDE_REASONS.reprint → reason_codes table query filtered by context=reprint
SH_PRINTERS → printers table query with real-time online status from ZPL printer health-check endpoint
Reprint action → Server Action: reprint_sscc() — INSERT sscc_print_jobs, INSERT shipping_audit_log with reason code
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.sscc.reprint.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-07: bulk SSCC reprint modal — current M-16 is single-label; spec mentions bulk ZPL job

entries.label: packing_slip_regen_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal size=sm → Dialog with small DialogContent (max-w-sm)
Hardcoded stale reason string → load from packing_slips.stale_reason field or compute dynamically (e.g. box weight updated after slip generated)
Previous version archived → packing_slips versioning: INSERT new row, mark old row archived=true, store version number
Add Server Action: regenerate_packing_slip() — compute fresh slip data, re-render PDF via Puppeteer edge function or Typst, INSERT new packing_slips row, archive old
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.slip.*

entries.label: bol_sign_upload_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Drag-and-drop file zone (onClick setHasFile mock) → react-dropzone or shadcn Input type=file with custom DropZone wrapper
File state (hasFile) → useForm with file field, accept PDF/JPG/PNG, max 10 MB validation via zod or file.size check

SHA-256 hash computation noted as server-side → Server Action: upload_signed_bol() — multipart upload to Supabase Storage, compute SHA-256 server-side (crypto.subtle or Node crypto), store in shipments.bol_signed_pdf_hash, set deletion disabled flag on storage object
BRCGS 7-year retention → Supabase Storage lifecycle policy or tagging for immutability; do not allow delete via RLS
P2 e-signature + PIN re-verify → add flag check; render placeholder when feature disabled
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.bol.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-01: SHIP-028 POD upload modal separate from BOL sign-off (consignee vs carrier-driver) not yet built

entries.label: carrier_create_edit_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent
Uncontrolled inputs with defaultValue → useForm controlled with zod: name required, trackingTemplate optional URL with {pro} placeholder validation
Phase 2 API integration note → render disabled API fields with badge, gate behind feature flag carrier_api_enabled
Add Server Action: upsert_carrier() with shipping_manager RBAC guard
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.carriers.*

entries.label: release_allocation_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent; btn-danger → destructive variant
Hardcoded LP/qty/line Summary rows → feed from so_allocations query for given allocation_id
Static reason options (so_cancelled/allocation_correction/customer_change/other) → reason_codes table or static enum in zod
Add Server Action: release_allocation() — UPDATE license_plates.status=available in 05-WAREHOUSE, DELETE so_allocations row, INSERT shipping_audit_log
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allocation.release.*

entries.label: allergen_override_modal
translation_notes: window.Modal → Dialog with DialogContent; btn-danger → destructive variant
Hardcoded allergen conflict product/allergen → compute from allergen_cascade_v1 server-side, pass as prop to modal
QA approver read-only field → derive from current session user (shipping_qa role), not editable
ReasonInput minLength=20 → zod string().min(20) with live character count feedback

Add Server Action: override_allergen_hold() — INSERT allergen_overrides with reason_code, notes, approver_id, sha256_hash of payload (P2: 21 CFR Part 11 e-sig + PIN re-verify), UPDATE so_allergen_status=overridden
P2 e-signature gate → render behind feature flag allergen_esig_enabled; show info alert when disabled
RBAC: shipping_qa role required; gate Server Action with session role check
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allergens.override.*

entries.label: shipping_dashboard
translation_notes: SH_KPIS_ROW1/ROW2 static arrays → Server Component fetching aggregated KPI queries (count by status, grouping by date range selected)
SH_ALERTS static array → alerts query from a shipping_alerts view or computed in loader; dismissal state stored in user_preferences or localStorage
feedFilter client filter on SH_ACTIVITY array → server-side filter via URL search param passed to query; use useQueryState from nuqs for filter persistence
Three inline SVG/HTML chart cards (by status, by day, on-time%) → replace with recharts or shadcn Charts (based on recharts); data from aggregation queries
D365 outbox card with hardcoded counts → live query from shipping_outbox_events grouped by status + dead-letter queue count from DLQ table
GS1/printers card with hardcoded data → query sscc_sequence current value + printers health check from ZPL printer status endpoint
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.dashboard.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-10: D365 DLQ inline drilldown on dashboard — link exists but no preview of failed event
BL-SHIP-11: Global topbar search static — index customers/SOs/shipments/SSCCs

entries.label: so_list_page
translation_notes: SH_SOS static mock array → Drizzle query on sales_orders joined with customers, allocations, holds; filter by tab status client state should become URL search params (status=, hold=, search=, carrier=, from=, to=)
Tab status counts computed client-side → include count per status in a single SQL GROUP BY query to avoid N+1
Bulk action toolbar (selected Set) → server-side bulk actions via Server Actions: bulk_allocate, bulk_wave_add, bulk_export; selection state can stay client-side
SOStatus / AllocBar / HoldChip sub-components → reusable Badge-based components in /components/shipping/
Export CSV button → Server Action: export_so_csv() streaming response with Content-Disposition header
Pagination (50/25/100 per page) → use cursor-based pagination with take/skip in Drizzle, page param in URL
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.list.*

entries.label: so_detail_page
translation_notes: SH_SO_DETAIL static → Server Component loading SO with all relations: lines, allocations, holds, picks, shipments, history via Drizzle
Tab state (lines/allocation/holds/picks/packs/documents/history) → URL hash or search param ?tab=lines for deep-linking and browser back
hasAllergenConflict client-side check → pre-compute in loader using allergen_cascade_v1, pass as boolean prop
canConfirm/canAllocate/canCancel status guards → derive from so.status on server, pass capability flags as props for conditional button rendering
Allocation tab: Ltree path display → render ltree string as breadcrumb chips /components/shared/LtreePath
History tab: full audit log → query shipping_audit_log filtered by entity_id=so_id, export CSV via Server Action
Documents tab placeholder → link to doc_hub filtered by so_id
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.so.detail.*

entries.label: allocation_global_page
translation_notes: SH_ALLOC_GLOBAL static rows → Drizzle query: sales_order_lines LEFT JOIN so_allocations, compute status (full/short/none/hold) in SQL CASE WHEN
KPI tiles (fully allocated/short/not allocated/on hold) → compute counts in same query with GROUP BY status

Three-column allocator UI (SO summary / LP candidates / current allocations) → Server Component for SO+allocations data; LP candidates list is FEFO-sorted: SELECT lps WHERE product_id=? AND status=available ORDER BY expiry ASC NULLS LAST, received_date ASC
Auto/Manual mode pills → URL param ?mode=auto|manual; manual mode adds checkboxes to LP rows
FefoRank visual component → color-coded badge based on rank integer (1=green best)
QAStatus badge → map qa_status enum values to Badge variants
Override button → inline action triggering allocation_override_modal with LP pre-filled
Shortfall alert → compute server-side: qty_ordered - sum(qty_allocated)
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.allocation.*

entries.label: pick_list_page
translation_notes: SH_PICKS static array → Drizzle query: pick_lists LEFT JOIN users (picker), LEFT JOIN waves; filter by status tab, search, picker, priority via URL search params
Tab counts computed client-side on mock array → include per-status counts in SQL GROUP BY subquery
Scanner launch card → render as Link href=/scanner/shipping/pick, not alert(); mobile-responsive card component
Progress component (current/total) → shadcn Progress primitive from @radix-ui/react-progress
Star priority display → map 1-5 priority integer to colored star icons, not raw emoji string iteration
Assign picker action in-row → open picker assign modal or inline Popover with picker select
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.list.*

entries.label: wave_builder_page
translation_notes: Two-column layout (available SOs left panel / wave kanban right) → CSS grid 300px 1fr with sticky left panel on scroll
SH_AVAILABLE_SOS static list → Drizzle query: sales_orders WHERE status=allocated AND NOT IN (select so_id from pick_list_sos); sort by promised_ship_date ASC
selectedSos client Set → useState sufficient since selection is transient; POST to Server Action with array
Wave kanban four columns (Unreleased/Released/In Pick/Completed) → query waves GROUP BY status, render WaveCol per status
WaveCol (sub-component, 27 lines) → extract as reusable component; Progress inside In Pick column uses shadcn Progress
Wave create form (priority + zone filter + release immediately) → inline sub-form, submit via Server Action: create_wave() inserting waves + wave_sos join rows
P2 route optimizer deferred → show disabled button with tooltip pointing to EPIC 11-J
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.wave.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-03: wave edit modal — Edit stub button on unreleased column without modal backing

entries.label: pick_detail_supervisor_page
translation_notes: SH_PICK_DETAIL static → Drizzle query: pick_lists WITH lines (pick_list_lines JOIN license_plates JOIN locations), wave, picker user
Two-column layout (lines table left / summary+actions right) → CSS grid 1fr 300px
FEFO deviation highlight (fefoDev flag) → compute server-side: pick_list_lines WHERE actual_lp_id != suggested_lp_id
Short pick alert with count → aggregate pick_list_lines WHERE status=short
FefoRank / PickStatus sub-components → shared Badge-based components
Ltree path in location column → shared LtreePath component rendering ltree segments as chips
Real-time progress (picked/total) → consider SWR polling or SSE for live supervisor view; static on first load
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pick.detail.*

entries.label: packing_stations_selector_page
translation_notes: SH_STATIONS static array → Drizzle query: packing_stations LEFT JOIN active shipments; real-time online status from ZPL printer health endpoint
Three-column responsive grid of station cards → CSS grid repeat(3,1fr), collapse to 2 or 1 on mobile
Left border color (green/amber/red) based on station state → use data-state attribute + CSS or inline style mapping
SH_PRINTERS count → aggregate from printers table WHERE online=true
Station card click → navigate to /shipping/packing/[stationId]
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pack.stations.*

entries.label: packing_station_workbench_page
translation_notes: SH_PACK_SESSION static → Drizzle query: shipments with active_box (pack_boxes WHERE status=open), closed_boxes, queue of pick_list_lines assigned to station
Three-column pack layout (queue / box builder / summary+checklist) → CSS grid with pack-queue, pack-box, pack-summary classes; tablet landscape supported
scan input (autoFocus) → controlled Input with keyDown handler; production integrates with barcode scanner USB HID input
Catch-weight variance computation (cwVar) → move to server: compare actual_kg from input against products.nominal_kg, validate against products.variance_tolerance_pct (D-SHP-17)
Closed boxes table with reprint → query pack_boxes WHERE status=closed for given shipment_id; reprint triggers sscc_preview_reprint_modal
Ship-confirm checklist (checks array) → compute real-time from shipment state; pass as booleans from Server Component
Box dimensions inputs → store in pack_boxes.dims_json; validate positive numbers
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.pack.workbench.*

entries.label: sscc_labels_queue_page
translation_notes: SH_SSCCS static array → Drizzle query: sscc_labels LEFT JOIN pack_boxes LEFT JOIN shipments LEFT JOIN customers LEFT JOIN printers; filter printed/error status
KPI tiles (printed/queued/errors/next_seq) → aggregate query + SELECT last_value FROM sscc_sequence
Bulk print selected (selected Set) → Server Action: bulk_print_sscc() with array of sscc_ids, dispatches ZPL jobs to printer queue
Print error alert for offline printer → real-time printer status from health-check endpoint; auto-retry on reconnect handled by printer queue worker
SsccLabelPreview at bottom → separate component rendered as HTML for screen; @media print CSS renders as 4x6 label layout
Printer select in reprint → query printers table with online status
SSCC-18 structure info card → static informational component, no data needed
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.sscc.*

entries.label: sscc_label_preview_component
translation_notes: Inline HTML label layout → production renders via ZPL template server-side (Zebra ZPL II); this HTML is for screen preview only
GS1-128 barcode placeholder (.ssl-gs1 empty div) → integrate bwip-js or server-side barcode generation (e.g. node-barcodes) to render actual GS1-128 SVG
AI field mapping (01/10/17/3103) → map GS1 application identifiers directly from LP/batch/expiry/weight fields in Drizzle query
Allergens display (bold) → EU 1169/2011 compliance: allergen names in <strong> tags, same in PDF output via Puppeteer
maxWidth inline style → apply via CSS variable or Tailwind class; component is reused in modals and queue page
Hardcoded labels (GS1-128 · AI (00) etc.) → static GS1 standard text, not i18n needed

entries.label: documents_hub_page
translation_notes: SH_DOCS_SLIPS / SH_DOCS_BOLS static arrays → Drizzle query: packing_slips / bills_of_lading LEFT JOIN shipments LEFT JOIN customers; filter by search/dates/customer/status via URL params
Two tabs (slips/bols) → URL param ?tab=slips|bols for deep-linking
Stale slip highlight (row-warning) → compute server-side: packing_slips WHERE generated_at < (last pack_box update for that shipment)
SHA-256 hash column → stored in packing_slips.content_hash / bills_of_lading.content_hash; display truncated + tooltip for full hash
Retention until column (BOL) → compute as generated_at + 7 years, store in bills_of_lading.retained_until
Regenerate action → packing_slip_regen_modal; Upload signed → bol_sign_upload_modal
BRCGS info alert → static informational component linking to compliance docs
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.hub.*

entries.label: packing_slip_preview_page
translation_notes: doc-layout two-column (controls left / preview right) → CSS grid sidebar + main; doc-page is printable HTML block
Hardcoded packing slip content (products/quantities/allergens) → Server Component loading packing_slips row with related sales_order_lines + allergen declarations
Template/language selects → packing_slip_templates table; multi-language P2 behind feature flag (V-SHIP-LBL-05)
EU 1169/2011 allergen bold declaration → server-side allergen aggregation per line, render <strong> in both HTML preview and PDF
Generate/regenerate button → Server Action + packing_slip_regen_modal; production PDF via Puppeteer edge function or Typst renderer
Version history list → query packing_slips WHERE shipment_id=? ORDER BY version DESC
SHA-256 hash display on generation → server computes and stores in packing_slips.content_hash, display in UI
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.slip.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-12: multi-language packing slip (V-SHIP-LBL-05, P2) — dropdown disabled

entries.label: bol_preview_page
translation_notes: doc-layout two-column → same pattern as packing_slip_preview_page; doc-page is printable HTML block with signature blocks
Hardcoded BOL content (boxes/SSCCs/weights) → Server Component loading bills_of_lading row with pack_boxes + sscc_labels + carrier + driver info
Carrier fields (pro number, freight class, HAZMAT) → stored in shipments.carrier_pro, shipments.freight_class; HAZMAT P2 behind feature flag (FR-7.44)
SHA-256 hash badge → stored in bills_of_lading.content_hash on generation; signed hash in bills_of_lading.signed_hash on BOL sign-off upload
BRCGS 7-year retention → Supabase Storage immutability; bills_of_lading.retained_until = generated_at + 7 years
Signature blocks (sig-block) → HTML placeholder for print; P2 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature replaces physical signature block
Aggregated allergen declaration → compute from all LP allergens in shipment via allergen_cascade_v1
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.documents.bol.*

entries.label: shipments_delivery_tracker_page
translation_notes: SH_SHIPMENTS static array → Drizzle query: shipments LEFT JOIN sales_orders LEFT JOIN customers LEFT JOIN carriers LEFT JOIN bills_of_lading; filter by status via URL params
Expandable row (React.Fragment + expanded Set) → use Collapsible from @radix-ui/react-collapsible or row expansion pattern via DataTable with getSubRows
Ship timeline (4 steps: Shipped/In transit/Out for delivery/Delivered) → extract ShipTimeline component; step states computed from shipments.status
Inline delivery tracking update form (status/estimated_delivery/notes) → mini form in expanded row, submit via Server Action: update_shipment_tracking()
KPI tiles (packing/packed/shipped/delivered) → aggregate counts in SQL GROUP BY status
P2 carrier webhook → when implemented, replaces manual status update with webhook handler updating shipments.status automatically
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.shipments.*

entries.label: carriers_list_page
translation_notes: SH_CARRIERS static array → Drizzle query: carriers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL; sort by is_default DESC, name ASC
P2 API integration info alert → static note; API fields (rate shopping/tracking webhooks) behind carrier_api_enabled feature flag
Deactivate button → Server Action: deactivate_carrier() with shipping_manager RBAC, UPDATE carriers.active=false
Rate basis badge → map enum values (Manual/Weight/Zone) to Badge variants
Tracking template column (URL with {pro} placeholder) → display as Link if static, truncate long URLs with tooltip
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.carriers.*

entries.label: rma_list_page
translation_notes: SH_RMAS static array → Drizzle query: rmas LEFT JOIN sales_orders LEFT JOIN customers; filter by status tab via URL param
Scanner launch card → Link href=/scanner/shipping/rma-receive with SCN-072 context
P2 disposition/credit note/restock features → hide behind rma_full_workflow feature flag; show Phase 2 placeholder cards
Create RMA button → navigate to /shipping/rma/new (separate page or wizard modal, SHIP-027 detail — BL-SHIP-04)
Disposition column (Pending/Pass) → enum badge from rmas.disposition field
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.rma.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-04: RMA Detail screen (SHIP-027) 4-tab not built

entries.label: shipping_settings_page
translation_notes: SH_SETTINGS static object → Drizzle query: tenant_settings WHERE module=shipping, or a dedicated shipping_config table; Admin-only via RBAC
Five tabs (allocation/wave/labels/d365/advanced) → URL param ?tab=allocation for deep-linking; each tab a separate form with its own Server Action
isAdmin role guard (disabled props on all inputs) → derive from session.role; render Fieldset with disabled attribute rather than per-input disabled
GS1 Company Prefix + SSCC sequence fields → read from shipping_config; sequence shown as read-only computed from PostgreSQL sequence last_value
Printers inline table → query printers table in labels tab, real-time online status from health endpoint
D365 tab fields are read-only (managed in 02-Settings) → render as Summary rows, link to /settings/integrations/d365
Save changes → separate Server Action per tab: save_allocation_settings(), save_wave_settings(), save_label_settings(); emit config.updated audit event
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.settings.*

entries.label: customer_list_page
translation_notes: SH_CUSTOMERS static array → Drizzle query: customers LEFT JOIN (subquery counting allergen_restrictions), open order count; filter via URL search params
Tab counts (all/active/inactive/pl/uk) → SQL GROUP BY active flag + country/name pattern matching; avoid client-side re-filtering of full dataset
Bulk actions (activate/deactivate/export) → Server Actions with selectedIds array; export CSV streams response
Import CSV button → navigate to /shipping/customers/import (wizard, or use import-export ui_pattern modal)
Allergen restriction badge in table → aggregate from customer_allergen_restrictions count
Credit status highlight (row-warning on exceeded) → compute credit_utilisation_pct in query: credit_used/credit_limit
Allergen cascade explanation info alert → static informational component
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.customers.list.*

entries.label: customer_detail_page
translation_notes: SH_CUSTOMER_DETAIL static → Drizzle query: customers WITH addresses, allergen_restrictions (refuses + requires_decl), open orders, credit info
Six tabs (profile/addresses/allergens/pricing/credit/history) → URL param ?tab=profile; pricing tab renders ScaffoldedScreen placeholder gated behind Phase 2

Allergen matrix (SH_ALLERGENS × refuses/requires_decl two-column grid of checkboxes) → controlled CheckboxGroup fed from customer_allergen_restrictions; Save button triggers Server Action: save_allergen_restrictions() with UPSERT
Live conflict query (current SOs with allergen conflicts) → sub-query: sales_order_lines WHERE so customer_id=? JOIN allergen_cascade computation, show only active/draft SOs
Credit tab — credit bar → compute pct server-side; P2 hard block info alert static
Address tab → CRUD table linking to address_modal; enforce V-SHIP-SO-02 here (count shipping addresses, warn if zero)
Order history tab → query sales_orders WHERE customer_id=? ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 4; export CSV Server Action
Hardcoded labels → next-intl keys under shipping.customers.detail.*
known_bugs: BL-SHIP-09: Pricing tab currently ScaffoldedScreen — needs P2 pricing agreements
